question: Add setter methods `setTitle(string)`, `setAuthor(string)`, and `setIsbn(string)` to the `Book` class. For `setTitle()`, ensure that the title cannot be set to an empty string; if an empty string is provided, print an error and do not update.

test_cases.expected:
Initial Book State:
  Title: Effective C++
  Author: Scott Meyers
  ISBN: 0-321-33487-6
--------------------------------
After updating author:
  Title: Effective C++
  Author: Scott W. Meyers
  ISBN: 0-321-33487-6
--------------------------------
After updating ISBN:
  Title: Effective C++
  Author: Scott W. Meyers
  ISBN: 978-0321334879
--------------------------------
Attempting to set title to an empty string (expecting error and no change)...
Error: Title cannot be set to an empty string. Title remains: 'Effective C++'
After attempting to set empty title (should be unchanged):
  Title: Effective C++
  Author: Scott W. Meyers
  ISBN: 978-0321334879
--------------------------------
After setting a new valid title:
  Title: More Effective C++
  Author: Scott W. Meyers
  ISBN: 978-0321334879
--------------------------------
